---
title: "About me"
toc: false
---


I am an optimization researcher working on distributed intelligence, multi-agent
systems, and networked control. My research develops mathematically grounded methods
for adaptive learning and coordination in cyber-physical and multi-robot systems—
especially when feedback is limited, noisy, delayed, or expensive to obtain.

**VERA** — *Victoria Erofeeva Research* — is my research umbrella for work on
adaptive networked intelligence: stochastic and zeroth-order optimization,
graph-based coordination, and control under uncertainty and asynchrony.

### Research interests

- Adaptive learning and efficient model optimization
- Distributed intelligence and multi-agent systems
- Networked control and multi-robot autonomy

### Contact

- Email: [victoria.erofeeva@gmail.com](mailto:vicki.ultramarine@gmail.com)
- GitHub: [Ultramarine-x64](https://github.com/Ultramarine-x64)
- LinkedIn: [victoria-erofeeva](https://www.linkedin.com/in/vicki-erofeeva/)
